mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, patient_no, patient_name, gender, birth_date, id_no_encrypted, mobile_encrypted, patient_type, status, source_channel, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM patient WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patient ( tenant_id, patient_no, patient_name, gender, birth_date, id_no_encrypted, mobile_encrypted, patient_type, status, source_channel ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{patientNo}, #{patientName}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{idNoEncrypted}, #{mobileEncrypted}, #{patientType}, #{status}, #{sourceChannel} )
mapper.update: UPDATE patient SET patient_no = #{patientNo}, patient_name = #{patientName}, gender = #{gender}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, id_no_encrypted = #{idNoEncrypted}, mobile_encrypted = #{mobileEncrypted}, patient_type = #{patientType}, status = #{status}, source_channel = #{sourceChannel}, updated_at = now() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
